creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Created attachment 147520
Patch to update sysutils/zsd to 2014-09-09-c2d3662

Upstream changes:

- New option: --not-really
- Option -d is understood to mean --destroy
- No longer fails to gather available snapshots on datasets containing spaces
- Slightly improved documentation

Redports build logs are available at:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140919110636-77563/
